error_signature: credentials reset to default when duplicating workflow
title: Credentials reset on workflow duplication
symptom: When duplicating a workflow, nodes with multiple credentials reset to the default credential. This occurs as if the node was newly created.
root_cause: The issue arises because the duplication process in n8n does not correctly preserve the selected credentials for nodes that have multiple options. This can lead to confusion and requires manual intervention to correct.
fix_steps: After duplicating the workflow, open each affected node
Manually re-select the correct credentials from the dropdown
agent_instruction: Manually re-select the correct credentials for each affected node after duplication.
